name: Roper Technologies Portfolio Software APIs
what_it_does: Roper Technologies operates a portfolio of niche vertical software businesses with individual REST APIs. Key portfolio companies include: Vertafore (insurance agency management, insurer connectivity), Aderant (legal practice management), MRI Software (real estate management — spun off), DAT Solutions (freight transportation network), IntelliTrans (supply chain visibility), PowerPlan (fixed asset and tax accounting), Strata Decision Technology (healthcare financial planning), Computype (laboratory labeling), Frontline Education (K-12 school HR and administration), and additional vertical SaaS businesses. Each portfolio company has independent APIs serving its vertical market. Enables AI agents to automate workflows across insurance, legal, real estate, freight, healthcare finance, and government verticals within the Roper ecosystem.
use_cases: Automating insurance agency workflows via Vertafore API
Managing legal billing from Aderant practice management agents
Tracking freight capacity from DAT freight network agents
Forecasting healthcare financials from Strata Decision agents
not_for: Horizontal enterprise software without niche vertical market focus
Organizations without Roper portfolio company customer relationships
Use cases requiring integrated cross-portfolio Roper data access
best_when: An insurance agency, law firm, healthcare system, or freight broker using a specific Roper Technologies portfolio company product wants AI agents to automate workflows, data retrieval, and reporting within that vertical software platform.
avoid_when: FRAGMENTATION RISK: Roper is a holding company — each portfolio company has independent APIs, credentials, documentation, and support. There is no unified Roper API or shared integration layer. Evaluate each portfolio company API separately. Roper portfolio membership changes via acquisitions and divestitures (MRI Software sold to GIC 2023); verify current portfolio before integration decisions.

auth.notes: No unified Roper API — each portfolio company has independent authentication. Sarasota, Florida HQ. Public (ROP NYSE). $5.7B+ annual revenue. Roper Technologies is a holding company for niche vertical software businesses. Business model: acquire durable, niche-dominant vertical software businesses with high recurring revenue and defensible market positions. No central developer portal. Portfolio includes: Vertafore, Aderant, DAT Solutions, PowerPlan, Strata Decision Technology, Frontline Education, Computype, ClubRunner, among others.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — individual portfolio company contracts
pricing.paid_tiers: Individual portfolio company pricing; typically annual enterprise subscription
pricing.notes: Sarasota, Florida. Founded 1981 (industrial origins, transformed to software). Public (ROP NYSE). $5.7B+ revenue (2023). Asset-light, vertical software model. Portfolio evaluation model: 'Rule of 40' companies with high margins and growth. S&P 500 component. Key portfolio companies: Vertafore (insurance software), Aderant (legal), DAT Solutions (freight network), PowerPlan (tax accounting), Strata Decision (healthcare finance), Frontline Education (K-12). Competes with Constellation Software (Canadian) for vertical software acquisition strategy.

known_agent_gotchas: FRAGMENTATION: No unified Roper API — each portfolio company (Vertafore, Aderant, DAT, Strata) has independent API, credentials, and documentation; evaluate each separately
Portfolio changes — Roper continuously acquires and divests businesses (sold MRI Software to GIC 2023); verify current portfolio membership before long-term integration decisions
Vertical-specific compliance — each Roper portfolio company operates in regulated verticals (insurance, legal, healthcare); compliance requirements vary significantly by portfolio company
No integration guarantee — there is no guarantee of API consistency, shared data models, or integration capabilities between Roper portfolio companies
Acquisition-era API debt — many Roper portfolio companies are mature businesses acquired over decades; some APIs may reflect legacy architectures with limited modernization investment
Support and SLA variability — each portfolio company has independent support organization and SLAs; Roper corporate does not provide centralized developer support
agent_readiness.security_notes: Vertical software portfolio. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Vertical-specific regulated data varies by portfolio company.

security_score_components.security_notes: Vertical software portfolio. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Vertical-specific regulated data.
